title: Adamant (disambiguation)
content:
:''"Adamant" should not be confused with [[Adamantine]]''

Two ships went by the name of '''''Adamant''''':

*'''''[[Adamant (bulk cruiser)|Adamant]]''''', a [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruiser]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].
*'''''[[Adamant (Victory-class)|Adamant]]''''', a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]].

{{Disambig}}
